steps.title: Use the minimum and maximum
steps.content: The minimum recorded rate is $0.6$ in/hr, so every recorded value satisfies $s\ge0.6$. The maximum recorded rate is $1.8$ in/hr, so every recorded value also satisfies $s\le1.8$.

steps.title: Write the compound inequality
steps.content: Both bounds must hold at the same time: $$0.6\le s\le1.8.$$
